subcodes.first_line: O Rahmatullah! Reflect upon the divine bounties. In one station, that is to say, the Most Exalted Station and Supreme Rank [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رحمه الله در نعمتهای الهی تفکر نما در یکمقام یعنی مقام اعلی و رتبه علیا
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @proclamation to the people of the world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
